Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Relates to a reduced retirement age for tier six Triborough bridge and tunnel authority employees
Summary: Relates to a reduced retirement age for tier six Triborough bridge and tunnel authority employees; provides such retirement may be reduced by four months.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the retirement and social security law and chapter 511 of the laws of 1988 amending the retirement and social security law relating to a reduction in retirement age for certain members, in relation to a reduced retirement age for tier six Triborough bridge and tunnel authority employees
